1.text: Centriacinar nodular opacities resembling tree-in-bud pattern in the anterior segment of the right upper lobe

2.text: Centriacinar nodular opacities resembling tree-in-bud pattern in the superior segment of the right lower lobe

3.text: Nodular consolidation areas in the anterior segment of the upper lobe

4.text: Ground glass opacities in the anterior segment of the upper lobe
